zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 4th Baron Poyntz於大約1313年出生在英國英格蘭艾可時，他的父親Sir Hugh Poyntz, 3rd Baron Poyntz22歲，母親Elizabeth Paveley20歲。他於大約1329年與Eleanor de Erleigh在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1376年享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: Poyntz,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Points
meanings: from the Old French personal name Ponz, Ponce, from Latin Pontius (see Ponce ).

habitational name from any of several places called Ponts (such as those in Manche and in Seine-Maritime, Normandy), from Latin pontes ‘bridges’. This name has been established since the 13th century in Ireland, where it appears as Pounce and Pounche, and is Gaelicized as Púinse.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 4th Baron Poyntz was born about 1313, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Hugh Poyntz, 3rd Baron Poyntz, was 22 and his mother, Elizabeth Paveley, was 20. He married Eleanor de Erleigh about 1329, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1376, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 4th Baron Poyntz est né environ 1313, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Hugh Poyntz, 3rd Baron Poyntz, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Paveley, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor d’Erleigh environ 1329, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1376, à l’âge de 64 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 4th Baron Poyntz(이)가 대략 1313년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh Poyntz, 3rd Baron Poyntz(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Paveley(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1329년 영국 런던에서 Eleanor de Erleigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1376년 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 4th Baron Poyntz родился около 1313 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Hugh Poyntz, 3rd Baron Poyntz было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Paveley, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de Erleigh около 1329 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1376 г. в возрасте 64 лет.
